desc: GitHub Pages static site with deploy workflow

files.index.html:
{{project}}

Edit index.html to get started.
files..github/workflows/deploy.yml:
name: Deploy to GitHub Pages

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]

jobs:
  deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      pages: write
      id-token: write
    environment:
      name: github-pages
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: actions/upload-pages-artifact@v3
        with:
          path: .
      - uses: actions/deploy-pages@v4
files.README.md:
# {{project}}

A GitHub Pages site. Push to `main` to deploy automatically.
